subject: dcaegen2-services-pm-mapper incorrectly mapping the measResults

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Please fix the copyright issues. Then you can add this to the commit message to get rid of the other error messages that are false positives:

onap-gerrit-review: -changelog-or-release-file-missing,-capitalized-extension

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> Please fix the copyright issues. Then you can add this to the commit message to get rid of the other error messages that are false positives:
> 
> onap-gerrit-review: -changelog-or-release-file-missing,-capitalized-extension


I am getting this error in pipeline.
<<< ERROR: (pom-version-already-released) ./pom.xml version 1.9.0 has already been released and needs to change >>>

1)	Should we change the version in pom.xml.

<groupId>org.onap.dcaegen2.services</groupId>
<artifactId>pm-mapper</artifactId>
 <version>1.9.0-SNAPSHOT</version>     to       1.9.1-SNAPSHOT

2)	Also in Changelog.md there is already a release 1.9.0
Should we add our jira DCAEGEN2-3190 under 1.9.0 
Or do we need to create a new release?

or should we suppress this error.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> > 
> > Please fix the copyright issues. Then you can add this to the commit message to get rid of the other error messages that are false positives:
> > 
> > onap-gerrit-review: -changelog-or-release-file-missing,-capitalized-extension
> 
> 
> I am getting this error in pipeline.
> <<< ERROR: (pom-version-already-released) ./pom.xml version 1.9.0 has already been released and needs to change >>>
> 
> 1)	Should we change the version in pom.xml.
> 
> <groupId>org.onap.dcaegen2.services</groupId>
> <artifactId>pm-mapper</artifactId>
>  <version>1.9.0-SNAPSHOT</version>     to       1.9.1-SNAPSHOT
> 
> 2)	Also in Changelog.md there is already a release 1.9.0
> Should we add our jira DCAEGEN2-3190 under 1.9.0 
> Or do we need to create a new release?
> 
> or should we suppress this error.

#1 - Yes version on pom.xml should be bumped up as 1.9.0 container is already released. Would suggest revising to 1.10.0 to avoid conflict with Kohn patch fixes if any.

#2 - Add an entry for new version (say 1.10.0). Once this patch is merged and snapshot is validated, container release can be done later by submitting corresponding release.yaml.

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

your build is failing because of

09:30:18 Collecting protobuf
09:30:18   Using cached protobuf-4.21.0rc2-py2.py3-none-any.whl (165 kB)
09:30:18 ERROR: Package 'protobuf' requires a different Python: 2.7.17 not in '>=3.7'

Patch Set 4:

> Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1
> 
> your build is failing because of
> 
> 09:30:18 Collecting protobuf
> 09:30:18   Using cached protobuf-4.21.0rc2-py2.py3-none-any.whl (165 kB)
> 09:30:18 ERROR: Package 'protobuf' requires a different Python: 2.7.17 not in '>=3.7'

In the console logs I see this command "virtualenv --system-site-packages /tmp/tmp.XEzyL59D0Trobot_venv" which creates "virtual environment CPython2.7.17.final.0-64".
Python 3.8.13,3.9.13 and 3.10.6 are already installed. we can change the virtualenv command to use python version as shown below.
virtualenv -p /path/to/any/bin/python.
This code is not in pmmapper but it is in 
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/admin/repos/ci-management
path in ci-management: jjb/integration/include-raw-integration-install-robotframework.sh.

This might effect all components pipeline.
